title: Registering to Vote
scene: 你在 DMV 顺便办理选民登记。

turns.en: Would you like to register to vote today?

turns.cn: 是的，我是美国公民，刚搬来本州。
turns.en: Yes. I'm a US citizen and just moved to this state.

turns.cn: 请填这张表，选政党或无党派。
turns.en: Fill out this form. Pick a party or no party.
Can I choose no party?

turns.cn: 可以，但初选可能有限制。
turns.en: Yes, but some primaries may be limited.
Will they mail me polling info?

turns.cn: 选前会寄选民手册和地点。
turns.en: You'll get a voter guide and location before the election.

title: At the Polling Place
scene: 选举日你去投票站投票。

turns.en: Hello. May I see your ID?
Here's my driver's license.
Sign here and take this card.
Where are the voting machines?

turns.cn: 帘子后面，工作人员会演示。
turns.en: Behind the booths. A worker will show you.
Can I change my choices before submitting?
Yes, until you press confirm.

title: Mail-in Ballot
scene: 你选择邮寄投票，向工作人员咨询流程。

turns.en: I'd like to request a mail-in ballot.
Are you registered at an address in this county?
Yes, same address.

turns.cn: 选票会寄到家，填完要证人签名。
turns.en: It'll be mailed to you. You need a witness signature.
What's the postmark deadline?

turns.cn: 选举日当天前邮戳有效，也可投箱。
turns.en: Postmarked by election day, or use a drop box.
Where's the drop box?

title: Asking About a Ballot Issue
scene: 你对选票上的地方提案不清楚，向朋友请教。

turns.en: Is Proposition B the school tax measure?

turns.cn: 对，房产税加一点，建两所新校。
turns.en: Yes. A small property tax bump for two new schools.

turns.cn: 反对的人说财政不透明。
turns.en: Opponents say the spending isn't transparent.

turns.cn: 选民手册两边论点都有，值得读。
turns.en: The voter guide has both sides. Worth reading.
I haven't decided how to vote yet.
That's fine. Look into it before you vote.
Thanks. I'll read the guide tonight.
